title: KaichoConfig
description: Per-repo configuration file (kaicho.config.json). All fields are optional — CLI flags override these values.

agents.description: Default agent list for scans. Supports variants like 'cursor:gemini-3.1-pro'. Overridden by --agents CLI flag.

agent.description: Default agent to use (omit to run all available)

scope.description: Comma-separated directory paths to limit scan scope (e.g. 'src,lib')

minSeverity.description: Minimum severity to include in output

fixModels.description: Per-agent model overrides for fixes (falls back to models if not set)

concurrency.description: Maximum number of parallel fix agents to run concurrently (default: 3)

retention.description: Number of scan runs to keep per agent+task (default: 3). Older runs are pruned automatically.

summarizerModel.description: Model for LLM summaries. Use 'openrouter:<org>/<model>' for remote (e.g. 'openrouter:openai/gpt-4o-mini'), or bare name for Ollama (default: gemma3:1b)

maxSweepRounds.description: Maximum number of sweep rounds before stopping (default: 3)
